title: Message Templates
subtitle: Manage pre-defined messages for quick communication.

purpose.label: Usage Purpose
purpose.helperText: This field determines which automated message this template will be used for. For example, an appointment reminder template will be used in automated appointment reminder messages.
purpose.whatsappNote: Templates used in automated WhatsApp messages must have the correct purpose set and must be approved by WhatsApp.

notifications.saveFailed: Message template could not be saved.
notifications.notFound: Message template was not found in the selected clinic, or you do not have access to it.
notifications.loadFailed: Message templates could not be loaded.

whatsappApproval.infoBody: Some templates must be approved by WhatsApp before they can be used for automated messages such as appointment reminders, no-show follow-ups, or post-treatment messages.
whatsappApproval.infoHint: Prepare your template, send it for WhatsApp approval, and track its status here. Approved templates can be used in automated messages.
whatsappApproval.channelHint: Templates used in WhatsApp automated messages must be approved by Meta/WhatsApp.
whatsappApproval.rejectedMessage: WhatsApp did not approve this template. Please edit the message and send it again.
whatsappApproval.bindingWarning: This template may have been approved for a different WhatsApp Business account. It may need to be resubmitted before it can be used with the current connection.
